{{Quote|The Fourth Battle Group takes on some of the most dangerous and difficult tasks in the Outer Rim.|[[General/Legends|General]] [[Ufwol]]|<ref name="SWG:JtL" />}}
The '''Fourth Battle Group''', nicknamed '''fourth battle fleet''', was one of the many fleets in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] navy.

==History==
It was commanded by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Willham Burke]] and was deployed in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].<ref name="SWG:JtL" /> It presumably became the [[New Republic Fourth Fleet|New Republic Fourth Battle Group]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' {{1st}}
